facebook.caption:
POV: you take a wrong turn on Đường Dinh Bà and stumble into the only restaurant in Ông Lang with a perfect 5.0 star rating.

Dina Restaurant. 235 reviews. Zero complaints.

Ông Lang is already off the main drag. Dina is the reason locals point you toward it. Small spot. Big reputation.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 235 people gave this place 5 stars. Watch what lands on the table and you'll understand why. Dina Restaurant, Ông Lang, Phu Quoc.
